title: psychotria hoffmannseggiana subsp. tribracteata
intro: Psychotria hoffmannseggiana subsp. tribracteata, also known as the tribracteate form of the Hoffmann's psychotria, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating various infections, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Psychotria hoffmannseggiana subsp. tribracteata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine for their therapeutic properties.
